name: @entwico/bonsai
description: Ship the smallest correct production node_modules: full runtime-closure tracing + rolldown rebundle
author: admin@entwico.com

scripts.test: pnpm test:unit && pnpm test:sample:astro && pnpm test:sample:node
scripts.test:sample:astro: pnpm -C samples/astro-app install && pnpm -C samples/astro-app build && vitest run tests/samples/astro.test.ts tests/samples/astro-rewrite.test.ts
scripts.test:sample:node: pnpm -C samples/node-app install && pnpm -C samples/node-app build && vitest run tests/samples/node.test.ts
scripts.validate: pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm test
